meaning: n.卡普里酒(一种产于意大利卡普里岛的不带甜味的白葡萄酒)
examples: The cliffs, lapped by a crystal-clear sea, remind her of Capri.
They carelessly typed CARPI instead of CAPRI.
A Swedish couple on holiday were traveling around Italy, and wanted to go to Capri.
At sixteen, devastated by tuberculosis, he spent time in Naples and Capri with his mother.
She heard TerraCycle would collect Capri Sun pouches and pay the school for them.
